#  Search and Filter for Change Events (iOS) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Read Only' level permissions or higher on the project's Change Events tool.


##  Steps 
#### Search for a Change Event
  1. Navigate to the **Change Events** tool using the Procore app on an iOS mobile device.
  2. Tap the **Search** bar to enter in a keyword or phrase matching the desired change event.  
  
![Change Events Ios Search Change Events](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/e98c3b2f9f84c703b368097a0ca10763/01f79116e7f5c7a1489286d448e92544/change-events-ios-search-change-events.png?fm=webp)  

  3. Tap a change event to view its details.


#### Filter Change Events
  1. Navigate to the **Change Events** tool using the Procore app on an iOS mobile device.
  2. Tap the **Filter** ![Icon Filter2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1e4b3ef496246c619285ebd3477db671/a7c3fd9c50cac8afbb81c1e492657fb8/icon-filter2.png?fm=webp&h=17) icon.  
  
![Change Events Ios Filter Change Events](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/f40ba006426b1b22f9bb713bbff2006a/844a2aa9dba6251bee8d902b00cbe05b/change-events-ios-filter-change-events.png?fm=webp)  

  3. Tap **All** to view all change events or tap a status to only view change events with that status.
  4. Tap **Apply**.


## See Also
  * [Change Events (iOS) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/change-events-ios/permissions)
  * [Create a Change Event (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/change-events-ios/tutorials/create-a-change-event-ios)
  * [Which Procore tools can I use to create a change event?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-procore-tools-can-i-use-to-create-a-change-event)
title: Search and Filter for Change Events (iOS)
description: How to search and filter for change events using the Procore app on an iOS mobile device.
